narrative:
Beavercreek 004 (precinct in Greene County) has 676 registered voters, with 47.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.3 percentage points.
